task_description: Final polish for Issue #17: add supplementary Mermaid diagrams (TDD cycle, experiment matrix, issue timeline, test distribution), coverage/metrics badges, and enhanced README experiment framing with self-grading reference and reader call-to-action.

verification.summary: Maven Central unreachable (network timeout) in sandbox. Since only README.md was modified (documentation-only change), build/test outcomes are unaffected. Verified: 5 new badges with valid shields.io URLs, 4 new Mermaid diagrams (TDD cycle, experiment matrix, Gantt timeline, pie chart), new 'Experiment Results and Self-Grading' section with metrics/verdicts/call-to-action, FINAL-REPORT.md linked in Further Reading, TOC updated with correct anchors. Review fixes applied: (1) pie chart now uses per-file test counts directly verifiable from source, (2) Human Code badge color changed from critical/red to blueviolet, (3) Gantt chart dates corrected from 2025 to 2026.
